name: Special Strawberry Bread
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Frozen unsweetened strawberries, thawed (reserve juice)
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
Puree strawberries using a blender, food processor, or strainer. You should have 1 cup of puree.
In a large bowl, mix flour, baking soda, baking powder, salt, and cinnamon.
Cream butter until well combined.
Add sugar, then eggs to the butter mixture until well-combined.
Alternately add dry ingredients, strawberry juice, and lemon juice to the butter mixture, beginning and ending with dry ingredients. Stir in strawberry puree.
Pour batter into a standard-sized loaf pan or two smaller (approximately 3x7-inch) loaf pans that have been well-greased.
Bake until a toothpick comes out clean, about 1 hour for a full-sized loaf, 50 minutes for smaller loaves.
Cool for 10 minutes in the pan; turn out onto a wire rack to finish cooling. Wrap and store for up to 24 hours before slicing.
